seoTitle: Can You Change Your PayPal Account Country in 2026?
metaDescription: PayPal won't let you change your account's country directly. Here's what that means, and the correct way to move your PayPal account abroad in 2026.
intro: Moving abroad or starting a business in a new region raises an obvious question for PayPal users: can you just change your account's country? The short answer is no, and this guide explains the difference between updating your address and changing your account's actual country, plus the correct workaround. It's aimed at freelancers, international users, and anyone relocating who wants to keep using PayPal without running into account limitations.

steps.heading: Understand what PayPal actually allows
steps.body: PayPal lets you update your address, but it does not allow you to directly change the country your account is registered under.

steps.heading: Know the difference between address and country
steps.body: Changing your street address within the same country is straightforward, but changing the underlying account country is a different, unsupported action.

steps.heading: Set up a new PayPal account for the new country
steps.body: The correct method is creating a new PayPal account registered to your new country, rather than trying to convert your existing account.

steps.heading: Handle your balance and linked cards
steps.body: Before closing your old account, move out any remaining balance and remove linked cards or bank accounts so nothing gets stranded.

steps.heading: Close your old account safely
steps.body: Once your balance is cleared and the new account is set up, close the old PayPal account following PayPal's standard closure process.

faq.question: Can I just edit my country in PayPal's account settings?
faq.answer: No — PayPal allows address updates but does not offer a direct option to change your account's registered country.

faq.question: What happens to my balance if I open a new PayPal account in another country?
faq.answer: You'll need to transfer or withdraw your balance from the old account before closing it, since balances don't automatically move to a new account in a different country.

faq.question: Will changing my address to another country get my account flagged?
faq.answer: It can — attempting to change your address to a different country than your account's registration is one of the mistakes that can lead to account limitation or a ban.

faq.question: Is creating a new account the only legal way to switch PayPal countries?
faq.answer: According to this guide, yes — creating a new account registered in your new country is presented as the correct and safe method, rather than trying to modify the existing one.
